_comment: Copy this file to webapp_config.json (gitignored) or let the webapp create it on the first 'Save defaults' tap. All keys are optional — missing keys fall back to the defaults in src/webapp_config.py.
_comment_auth_token: Empty string = auth gate OFF (the default). Run scripts/gen_token.py to generate a strong token; the webapp will then require Authorization: Bearer <token> on every API call from non-loopback callers.
_comment_auth_password: Optional companion to auth_token: when set, a fresh device with no token shows a login overlay; entering the password swaps it for the bearer token. Set/clear via scripts/set_password.py. Failed attempts are logged to webapp/auth.log.
_comment_projects_dir: Master folder whose direct child directories the Claude Code tab lists as launchable projects. Defaults to the parent of this repo (E:\automation\... by default).
_comment_projects_ignore: gitignore-style patterns: directory names under projects_dir to hide from the Claude Code tab. Matched case-insensitively against the bare folder name; * and ? globs are honoured (e.g. 'archive', '*-old'). VCS/build dirs (.git, .venv, node_modules, ...) are always skipped regardless.
_comment_apps_scan_root: Where the Apps tab scans recursively for launcher *.bat files. Defaults to the same parent as projects_dir.
_comment_claude_flags: Persisted default flags for the Claude Code launcher. '--remote-control' is always added — don't list it here. claude_permission_mode selects the permission flag: 'auto' (--permission-mode auto: no prompts, a classifier blocks dangerous actions) or 'skip' (--dangerously-skip-permissions: no prompts, no safety net).
_comment_antigravity_flags: Antigravity CLI (agy) launch toggles, set from the Coding options card. The Antigravity CLI has no model/effort flags — its model is picked with /model in-session — so antigravity_skip_permissions (--dangerously-skip-permissions) and antigravity_sandbox (--sandbox) are the only launch knobs.
_comment_copilot_flags: GitHub Copilot CLI (copilot) launch settings, set from the Coding options card. copilot_model is the --model value (empty = the CLI's own default); copilot_skip_permissions is the --allow-all switch.
_comment_session_host_port: Loopback port the PTY session-host binds. Never network-reachable; the webapp proxies to it. Must differ from 'port'.
_comment_tailnet_allowlist: Extra IPs / CIDRs allowed to reach the interactive terminal endpoints, on top of loopback + the Tailscale CGNAT range 100.64.0.0/10. Leave empty unless you need LAN access.
_comment_claude_show_local_window: When true (default), launching a session from the phone also opens an interactive terminal window for it on the PC. It connects over loopback so input works from both the phone and the PC.
_comment_webauthn: Passkey gate for the interactive terminal. webauthn_rp_id is the bare tailnet hostname (e.g. 'pc.tailnet.ts.net'); webauthn_origin is the full https origin the phone connects to (e.g. 'https://pc.tailnet.ts.net:8445'). Leave both empty to disable the passkey gate.
_comment_notifications: Jobs-tab failure notifications (issue #66). Set both pushover_api_token + pushover_user_key and flip notify_on_failure: true to start receiving a push per failed run. notify_failure_streak: N also fires when N consecutive failures stack up (0 = disabled). notify_failure_summary: true pipes the output tail through the local LLM hub (http://127.0.0.1:8000, claude-haiku-4-5) for a one-line root-cause line prepended to the push body.
